case_title: PALAGANAS, AVELINA P. vs. RIGHTMER, SETH DONALD et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALAGANAS, AVELINA P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIGHTMER, SETH DONALD HIGHBRIDGE, LEIGH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 874 POTRERO AVE #2, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT- CRC 522 INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES- CCP 415.46.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALAGANAS, AVELINA P. AS TO DEFENDANT RIGHTMER, SETH DONALD HIGHBRIDGE, LEIGH DOES 1 TO 1O, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $183.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE MAR-29-1996, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALAGANAS, AVELINA P.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALAGANAS, AVELINA P. SERVED FEB-07-1996, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RIGHTMER, SETH DONALD HIGHBRIDGE, LEIGH

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $183.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $960.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALAGANAS, AVELINA P. AS TO DEFENDANT RIGHTMER, SETH DONALD HIGHBRIDGE, LEIGH
DECLARATION OF AVELINE P. PALAGANAS FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALAGANAS, AVELINA P.
